commands.review_summary:
The PR updates WebChat Stop handling to terminalize aborted sessions, locally clear confirmed stopped runs, guard stale same-session lifecycle events by run generation, and add Gateway/UI regressions.

PR surface: Source +262, Tests +399. Total +661 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main leaves Stop recovery dependent on delayed lifecycle/session reconciliation, and the PR adds focused regressions for the Stop-then-send path. I did not run a fresh current-main browser reproduction in this read-only review.
